designNotes.skillBaseline: Chaos burst, 0.8 SPR, 6s CD. Consumes Hexed for 2× damage. Creates Soul Stack (max 5, 10s, refreshes).

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Soul Harvest as a DoT applier — every cast sows debuffs on the target alongside the burst.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Soul Harvest empowers and heals minions — 'feed' the pack with each harvest.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Soul Harvest as the burst king — hex consume goes nuclear, soul stacks empower future casts.

branches.theme: Each harvest plants disease alongside the burst. The target rots while you take their soul.

nodes.name: Hexed Reaper
nodes.description: When Soul Harvest consumes Hexed: deal +25/50% additional damage on top of the 2× consume bonus.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHexedConsumeBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_soul_harvest when consuming hexed: damageMult *= 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Reaper's Sickness
nodes.description: Soul Harvest applies 1/2 stacks of Poisoned (4s) on hit.

nodes.name: Soulrot
nodes.description: Soul Harvest applies a unique Soulrot debuff: 5% target max HP as chaos DoT over 4 seconds (unstackable).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestApplySoulrot (NEW — staff.ts postCast: apply soulrot debuff to target with calculated tick damage = target.maxHp * percent/100 / duration)

nodes.name: Plague Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on target.

nodes.name: Hex Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% Soul Harvest damage on Hexed targets.

nodes.name: Crit Hex
nodes.description: Soul Harvest critical strikes apply Hexed (5s) to the target.

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.

nodes.name: Reaper's Bloom
nodes.description: When Soul Harvest kills a target, all DoTs on the target spread to ALL pack enemies at 50% snapshot.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestKillSpreadDots (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killer was soul_harvest, copy DoT debuffs to all alive pack at snapshot * percent/100)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Soulrot Lord
nodes.description: Soulrot debuff (T2) damage tripled and duration +50%. Cost: −20% Soul Harvest direct damage.

nodes.name: Plague Reaper
nodes.description: Soul Harvest applies ALL of your DoTs (Locust, Haunt, Toads' poison) at 50% snapshot to the target. Cost: Soul Harvest CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestApplyAllDots (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per skill in [locust, haunt, toads_poison], apply DoT debuff to target with current snapshot * percent/100); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Death Bloom
nodes.description: Soul Harvest deals +50% damage per debuff currently on the target (caps at +250%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestPerDebuffBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: count target debuffs, damageMult *= 1 + min(maxPercent, count * perDebuffPercent)/100)

nodes.name: THE PLAGUE REAPER
nodes.description: Soul Harvest no longer deals direct damage. Instead applies a unique 'Soul Decay' debuff: 25% target max HP as chaos damage over 5s, unremovable. Cost: removes the 2× hex consume bonus.

branches.theme: Souls feed the dead. Soul Harvest heals and empowers your minion pack.

nodes.name: Soul Reservoir
nodes.description: Max soul_stack cap +1/2 (5→6/7).

nodes.name: Pack Feast
nodes.description: On Soul Harvest cast: heal each living minion for 10/20% of their max HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHealsMinionsPercent (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per living minion, m.hp = min(maxHp, hp + maxHp * value/100))

nodes.name: Spirit Pact
nodes.description: On Soul Harvest cast: minions gain +50% damage and +30% attack speed for 5s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestBuffsMinions (NEW — staff.ts postCast: set per-minion damage+ASPD buffs with expiry)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +15/30% Soul Harvest damage while any minion is alive.

nodes.name: Bound Crit
nodes.description: +15/30% crit chance while 2+ minions alive.

nodes.name: Soul Spark
nodes.description: Soul Harvest critical strikes have 50/100% chance to summon a 4s spirit minion.

nodes.name: Soul Drain
nodes.description: Soul Harvest heals you for 5/10% of damage dealt.

nodes.name: Vital Harvest
nodes.description: Each soul_stack consumed (by any skill) heals ALL minions for 5% max HP.
engineFields: soulStackConsumeHealsMinions (EXISTS in 34 staff fields per handoff)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.

nodes.name: Soul Conduit
nodes.description: Each soul_stack you have grants +5% all minion damage and HP. Cost: Soul Harvest direct damage −25%.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulStackBuffsMinionsPercent (NEW — staff.ts summonMinions + minion attack hook: damage and hp *= 1 + soulStackStacks * value/100); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Forge
nodes.description: On Soul Harvest cast that consumes Hexed: also resummon all your minions at full HP. Cost: Soul Harvest CD +3s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHexedConsumeResummonsMinions (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_soul_harvest when consuming hexed: call summonMinions for zombie_dog + fetish, refreshing); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Bind
nodes.description: While 4+ soul_stacks active: minions are immune to damage (cannot lose HP).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulStackMinionInvuln (NEW — minions.ts absorbDamage: if soulStackStacks >= minStacks, return 0 damage absorbed, full overkill passes to player)

nodes.name: BLOOD PRIEST
nodes.description: Soul Harvest can target your own minions. Targeting a minion: heals it for 200% of damage dealt and gives all minions Pack Frenzy (+50% damage 4s). Cost: Soul Harvest cannot crit.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestCanTargetMinions (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: allow minion as target, heal m.hp by damageDealt * mult, set per-minion damage buff); rawBehaviors.soulHarvestCannotCrit (NEW — tick.ts crit roll: skip)

branches.theme: Pure burst. Hex consume goes nuclear, soul stacks empower future Mass Sacrifices.

nodes.name: Soul Focus
nodes.description: +10/20% Soul Harvest critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Soul Trigger
nodes.description: Soul Harvest critical strikes generate +1/2 additional soul_stacks (on top of base 1).

nodes.name: Reaper's Edge
nodes.description: Soul Harvest's hexed-consume bonus becomes 3× damage (up from 2×).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHexedConsumeMult (NEW — same as Hex Voodoo T5b 'Burst Master', stacks if both allocated; document multiplicative interaction)

nodes.name: Soul Bond
nodes.description: +5/10% Soul Harvest damage per active soul_stack.

nodes.name: Hunter's Eye
nodes.description: Each consecutive Soul Harvest on the same target grants +10/20% crit multiplier (max 5 stacks).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); conditionParam.sameTarget+resetOnTargetSwitch (NEW); BUFF_DEFS.huntersEye (NEW — shared with Spirit Barrage Voodoo T3a)

nodes.name: Hex Catalyst
nodes.description: On Soul Harvest cast: 35/70% chance to instantly cast Hex on target. ICD 5s.

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Soul Harvest cooldown.

nodes.name: Soul Surge
nodes.description: On Soul Harvest cast: gain Soul Surge (+50% damage to your next Mass Sacrifice in 8s).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); BUFF_DEFS.soulSurge (NEW — consumed by next Mass Sacrifice cast)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Final Whisper
nodes.description: Soul Harvest deals +100% damage to enemies below 25% HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestExecuteThreshold (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: if target hpPct < hpPercent, damageMult *= 1 + damageBonus/100)

nodes.name: Greater Reservoir
nodes.description: Soul stack max cap raised to 10. Each soul_stack now grants +20% Soul Harvest damage. Cost: Soul Harvest direct damage −20%.

nodes.name: Soul Refund
nodes.description: When Soul Harvest kills a target, refund 50% of its cooldown.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestKillRefundCdPercent (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killer was soul_harvest, set its cooldown timer *= (1 - value/100))

nodes.name: THE SOUL EATER
nodes.description: Soul Harvest now consumes ALL your soul_stacks on cast: each consumed adds +50% damage. Cost: Soul Harvest no longer creates a soul_stack on cast.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestConsumesAllStacks (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: read soul_stack stacks, damageMult *= 1 + stacks * perStackPercent/100, consume comboState); rawBehaviors.soulHarvestNoCreateStack (NEW — staff.ts postCast: skip soul_stack creation when set)
